name: Jupiter Transit 4th/9th House — Property Blessings Activated
description: Transit Jupiter passing through the 4th or 9th house from Lagna activates property blessings, creating a medium-term window for house purchase and real estate investment.

source_text.quote: When Jupiter transits the 4th house, the native acquires conveyances, lands, and houses. In the 9th, fortune rises and paternal property comes.

all_of: Transit Jupiter is in the 4th or 9th house from Lagna
any_of: Transit Jupiter is in own/exaltation sign

interpretation.meaning: Jupiter's transit through the 4th house (property) or 9th house (fortune) activates divine blessings for property acquisition. This is the primary transit trigger for real estate success.

metadata.notes: Jupiter spends ~1 year per sign. Transit through 4th/9th creates a 12-month property window. Most effective when dasha is also supportive.

name: Lagna Lord Transit Through 4th House — Self Enters Property Domain
description: When the Lagna lord transits through the 4th house, the native's identity and initiative (Lagna) directly activates the property sector, creating personal involvement in property matters.

source_text.quote: When the Lagna lord transits the 4th, the native himself pursues acquisition of houses, lands and domestic comforts with determination.

all_of: Transit Lagna lord is in the 4th house from Lagna
any_of: Lagna lord is a natural benefic
Lagna lord is in own/friendly sign during transit

interpretation.meaning: The Lagna lord (self/identity) transiting the 4th house (property) creates direct personal activation of property matters. The native takes initiative in house purchase.

metadata.notes: Duration depends on whether Lagna lord is slow (Saturn/Jupiter ~1yr) or fast (Moon ~2.5 days). Most significant for slow-moving Lagna lords.

name: Jupiter Trine 4th Lord Navamsa Position — Deep Property Activation
description: Transit Jupiter forming a trine (120°) to the 4th lord's Navamsa (D9) position activates deep property karma, indicating destined property acquisition at the soul level.

source_text.quote: When Jupiter aspects the Navamsa position of the 4th lord by trine, the native acquires property destined from previous birth karma.

all_of: Transit Jupiter is trine (within 5°) to the 4th lord's Navamsa longitude

interpretation.meaning: Jupiter trining the 4th lord's Navamsa position activates deep karmic property destiny. This is a soul-level activation indicating property that was meant to come to the native.

metadata.notes: Navamsa-level activation adds depth to transit analysis. Trine is the most harmonious aspect for property blessings.

name: Mars (Bhumi Karaka) Conjunct Lagna/Moon Lord — Land Action Activation
description: Transit Mars (Bhumi Karaka/natural significator of land) conjuncting the natal Lagna lord or Moon lord activates direct land action — the native is compelled to acquire property.

source_text.quote: When Mars, the karaka of land, transits over the Lagna lord or Moon's dispositor, the native engages in land transactions and property actions.

all_of: Transit Mars is conjunct (within 5°) natal Lagna lord OR natal Moon lord position
any_of: Mars is in own/exalted sign during transit
Mars is aspected by Jupiter during transit

interpretation.meaning: Mars as Bhumi Karaka (lord of land) conjuncting the Lagna lord (self) or Moon lord (mind/comfort) creates direct impetus for property action. The native feels compelled to buy land.

metadata.notes: Mars transits fast (~45 days/sign) so this creates a tight window. Most effective when dasha and slow transits already support property.
